mirrors.name: Scripture — The Passion Translation
mirrors.description: Biblical passages from The Passion Translation mapped to Lucid Principles tuning combinations. Each passage selected for resonance with the principle's teaching, frequency, and signal character.

mirrors.name: Music Mirror
mirrors.description: Popular songs mapped to Lucid Principles through shared lyrical resonance. Each song carries a frequency — the music mirror reflects your tuning through songs you already know.

mirrors.name: Tao Te Ching
mirrors.description: Ancient wisdom from Lao Tzu mapped to Lucid Principles. The Tao speaks to the same territory — pattern recognition, non-attachment, alignment with the flow of reality.
